grid_modes.landing: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid, gap-8 to gap-12, col-span mixing)
grid_modes.dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room Grid, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4 to gap-6)

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, asymmetrical hero sections, left-aligned data

surface_strategies.cards: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]
surface_strategies.highlight_cards: The Tracing Beam (Aceternity Look) with Gold/Copper gradient glow for Jackpot/AI Prediction sections

motion_and_interactions.landing_hero: React Three Fiber scroll-driven 3D book animation. Use ScrollControls from @react-three/drei. Map scroll offset to book open/close and page turns.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: translate-y-[-2px] shadow-lg border-white/20 text-white transition-all duration-300
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, add aria-hidden to decorative 3D elements

hero_background.description: Abstract dark geometric pattern with golden accents

government_seal.description: Gold crest/seal for exam authority sections

study_vibe.description: Lit candle next to open notebook and laptop, moody study vibe

architecture.description: Large ornate government building, for APSC/UPSC sections

component_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='start-mock-test-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup a dark theme Tailwind configuration utilizing the color palette provided. DO NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions.

2. Implement the 3D scroll-driven book using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei's ScrollControls. Wrap the 3D scene in a full-height container and map scroll.offset to book opening/page turning logic. Use a simple BoxGeometry for pages if custom GLTF is unavailable.
3. Structure the landing page around the 3D canvas (position fixed or sticky) with HTML overlay sections revealing text as the user scrolls.
4. For the Student Dashboard, use Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room). Dense, high-contrast typography, and Glassmorphism cards.
5. Utilize Playfair Display for massive, luxury-feel headings, and Outfit for readable, modern dashboard data.
6. Use Recharts for performance analytics and weakness analysis.
7. DO NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
8. Ensure the dashboard contains student weakness analysis, mock test system, and a section for AI exam question prediction (Jackpot features).
